title: 01934_Suitability_Filter_A_Statistical_Framework_for_Classifier_Evaluation_in_Real-World_Deployment_Settings
positive_examples: Improves the robustness and fairness of machine learning models by offering tools to assess their suitability without requiring ground-truth labels.
Enhances trustworthiness in automated systems especially in safety-critical deployment contexts.
Potential to improve fairness by enabling consistent performance evaluation across diverse subpopulations.
negative_examples: Assumes access to well-calibrated prediction correctness estimators, which might not hold in all scenarios, potentially leading to incorrect evaluations.
Improper parameter choices or misinterpretations of results could exacerbate existing biases in datasets or models.
Misuse or overreliance on automated evaluation frameworks without human oversight could have adverse effects.
